expected_knots.about: both mention a 'cache' — but Ana's is an on-device SQLite offline cache and Dao's is the CI build cache; no shared resource, no dependency
both mention a 'rename' — Ben renames marketing-site URL slugs, unrelated to anything Ana touches; not a breaking-change collision
three different unrelated dates (Ana's Friday demo, Ben's end-of-next-week SEO merge, Dao's no-deadline maintenance) — surface 'deadline' overlap with no shared timeline to diverge on
